verses.king_james: Gather yourselves together, yea, gather together, O nation not desired;

verses.latin_vulgate: priusquam pariat jussio quasi pulverem transeuntem diem,  antequam veniat super vos ira furoris Domini,  antequam veniat super vos dies indignationis Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּטֶ֙רֶם֙ לֶ֣דֶת חֹ֔ק כְּמֹ֖ץ עָ֣בַר י֑וֹם בְּטֶ֣רֶם ׀ לֹא־יָב֣וֹא עֲלֵיכֶ֗ם חֲרוֹן֙ אַף־יְהֹוָ֔ה בְּטֶ֙רֶם֙ לֹא־יָב֣וֹא עֲלֵיכֶ֔ם י֖וֹם אַף־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Before the decree bring forth, before the day pass as the chaff, before the fierce anger of the Lord come upon you, before the day of the Lord’s anger come upon you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quærite Dominum, omnes mansueti terræ,  qui judicium ejus estis operati ;  quærite justum, quærite mansuetum,  si quomodo abscondamini in die furoris Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּקְּשׁ֤וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָה֙ כׇּל־עַנְוֵ֣י הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר מִשְׁפָּט֖וֹ פָּעָ֑לוּ בַּקְּשׁוּ־צֶ֙דֶק֙ בַּקְּשׁ֣וּ עֲנָוָ֔ה אוּלַי֙ תִּסָּ֣תְר֔וּ בְּי֖וֹם אַף־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Seek ye the Lord, all ye meek of the earth, which have wrought his judgment; seek righteousness, seek meekness: it may be ye shall be hid in the day of the Lord’s anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia Gaza destructa erit,  et Ascalon in desertum :  Azotum in meridie ejicient,  et Accaron eradicabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י עַזָּה֙ עֲזוּבָ֣ה תִֽהְיֶ֔ה וְאַשְׁקְל֖וֹן לִשְׁמָמָ֑ה אַשְׁדּ֗וֹד בַּֽצׇּהֳרַ֙יִם֙ יְגָ֣רְשׁ֔וּהָ וְעֶקְר֖וֹן תֵּעָקֵֽר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For Gaza shall be forsaken, and Ashkelon a desolation: they shall drive out Ashdod at the noon day, and Ekron shall be rooted up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Væ qui habitatis funiculum maris, gens perditorum !  verbum Domini super vos, Chanaan, terra Philisthinorum ;  et disperdam te, ita ut non sit inhabitator.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֗וֹי יֹ֥שְׁבֵ֛י חֶ֥בֶל הַיָּ֖ם גּ֣וֹי כְּרֵתִ֑ים דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֣ה עֲלֵיכֶ֗ם כְּנַ֙עַן֙ אֶ֣רֶץ פְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים וְהַאֲבַדְתִּ֖יךְ מֵאֵ֥ין יוֹשֵֽׁב׃
verses.king_james: Woe unto the inhabitants of the sea coast, the nation of the Cherethites! the word of the Lord is against you; O Canaan, the land of the Philistines, I will even destroy thee, that there shall be no inhabitant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit funiculus maris requies pastorum, et caulæ pecorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהָיְתָ֞ה חֶ֣בֶל הַיָּ֗ם נְוֺ֛ת כְּרֹ֥ת רֹעִ֖ים וְגִדְר֥וֹת צֹֽאן׃
verses.king_james: And the sea coast shall be dwellings and cottages for shepherds, and folds for flocks.

verses.latin_vulgate: et erit funiculus ejus qui remanserit de domo Juda : ibi pascentur,  in domibus Ascalonis ad vesperam requiescent,  quia visitabit eos Dominus Deus eorum,  et avertet captivitatem eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָ֣יָה חֶ֗בֶל לִשְׁאֵרִ֛ית בֵּ֥ית יְהוּדָ֖ה עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם יִרְע֑וּן בְּבָתֵּ֣י אַשְׁקְל֗וֹן בָּעֶ֙רֶב֙ יִרְבָּצ֔וּן כִּ֧י יִפְקְדֵ֛ם יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֖ם וְשָׁ֥ב (שבותם) [שְׁבִיתָֽם]׃
verses.king_james: And the coast shall be for the remnant of the house of Judah; they shall feed thereupon: in the houses of Ashkelon shall they lie down in the evening: for the Lord their God shall visit them, and turn away their captivity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivi opprobrium Moab,  et blasphemias filiorum Ammon,  quæ exprobraverunt populo meo,  et magnificati sunt super terminos eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֙עְתִּי֙ חֶרְפַּ֣ת מוֹאָ֔ב וְגִדֻּפֵ֖י בְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֑וֹן אֲשֶׁ֤ר חֵֽרְפוּ֙ אֶת־עַמִּ֔י וַיַּגְדִּ֖ילוּ עַל־גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: I have heard the reproach of Moab, and the revilings of the children of Ammon, whereby they have reproached my people, and magnified themselves against their border.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea vivo ego, dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël,  quia Moab ut Sodoma erit,  et filii Ammon quasi Gomorrha :  siccitas spinarum, et acervi salis,  et desertum usque in æternum :  reliquiæ populi mei diripient eos,  et residui gentis meæ possidebunt illos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן חַי־אָ֡נִי נְאֻם֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה צְבָא֜וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל כִּי־מוֹאָ֞ב כִּסְדֹ֤ם תִּֽהְיֶה֙ וּבְנֵ֤י עַמּוֹן֙ כַּעֲמֹרָ֔ה מִמְשַׁ֥ק חָר֛וּל וּמִכְרֵה־מֶ֥לַח וּשְׁמָמָ֖ה עַד־עוֹלָ֑ם שְׁאֵרִ֤ית עַמִּי֙ יְבׇזּ֔וּם וְיֶ֥תֶר גּוֹיִ֖ יִנְחָלֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore as I live, saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, Surely Moab shall be as Sodom, and the children of Ammon as Gomorrah, even the breeding of nettles, and saltpits, and a perpetual desolation: the residue of my people shall spoil them, and the remnant of my people shall possess them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc eis eveniet pro superbia sua,  quia blasphemaverunt et magnificati sunt  super populum Domini exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֥את לָהֶ֖ם תַּ֣חַת גְּאוֹנָ֑ם כִּ֤י חֵֽרְפוּ֙ וַיַּגְדִּ֔לוּ עַל־עַ֖ם יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: This shall they have for their pride, because they have reproached and magnified themselves against the people of the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Horribilis Dominus super eos,  et attenuabit omnes deos terræ :  et adorabunt eum viri de loco suo,  omnes insulæ gentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹרָ֤א יְהֹוָה֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם כִּ֣י רָזָ֔ה אֵ֖ת כׇּל־אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָאָ֑רֶץ וְיִשְׁתַּֽחֲווּ־לוֹ֙ אִ֣ישׁ מִמְּקוֹמ֔וֹ כֹּ֖ל אִיֵּ֥י הַגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.king_james: The Lord will be terrible unto them: for he will famish all the gods of the earth; and men shall worship him, every one from his place, even all the isles of the heathen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et vos, Æthiopes, interfecti gladio meo eritis.
verses.king_james: Ye Ethiopians also, ye shall be slain by my sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extendet manum suam super aquilonem, et perdet Assur,  et ponet speciosam in solitudinem,  et in invium, et quasi desertum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֵ֤ט יָדוֹ֙ עַל־צָפ֔וֹן וִֽיאַבֵּ֖ד אֶת־אַשּׁ֑וּר וְיָשֵׂ֤ם אֶת־נִֽינְוֵה֙ לִשְׁמָמָ֔ה צִיָּ֖ה כַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.king_james: And he will stretch out his hand against the north, and destroy Assyria; and will make Nineveh a desolation, and dry like a wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et accubabunt in medio ejus greges, omnes bestiæ gentium ;  et onocrotalus et ericius in liminibus ejus morabuntur :  vox cantantis in fenestra,  corvus in superliminari,  quoniam attenuabo robur ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָבְצ֨וּ בְתוֹכָ֤הּ עֲדָרִים֙ כׇּל־חַיְתוֹ־ג֔וֹי גַּם־קָאַת֙ גַּם־קִפֹּ֔ד בְּכַפְתֹּרֶ֖יהָ יָלִ֑ינוּ ק֠וֹל יְשׁוֹרֵ֤ר בַּֽחַלּוֹן֙ חֹ֣רֶב בַּסַּ֔ף כִּ֥י אַרְזָ֖הֿ עֵרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And flocks shall lie down in the midst of her, all the beasts of the nations: both the cormorant and the bittern shall lodge in the upper lintels of it; their voice shall sing in the windows; desolation shall be in the thresholds: for he shall uncover the cedar work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est civitas gloriosa habitans in confidentia,  quæ dicebat in corde suo :  Ego sum, et extra me non est alia amplius :  quomodo facta est in desertum cubile bestiæ ?  omnis qui transit per eam sibilabit,  et movebit manum suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֞֠את הָעִ֤יר הָעַלִּיזָה֙ הַיּוֹשֶׁ֣בֶת לָבֶ֔טַח הָאֹֽמְרָה֙ בִּלְבָבָ֔הּ אֲנִ֖י וְאַפְסִ֣י ע֑וֹד אֵ֣יךְ ׀ הָיְתָ֣ה לְשַׁמָּ֗ה מַרְבֵּץ֙ לַֽחַיָּ֔ה כֹּ֚ל עוֹבֵ֣ר עָלֶ֔יהָ יִשְׁרֹ֖ק יָנִ֥יעַ יָדֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: This is the rejoicing city that dwelt carelessly, that said in her heart, I am, and there is none beside me: how is she become a desolation, a place for beasts to lie down in! every one that passeth by her shall hiss, and wag his hand.
